conditions.critical_condition_basis: Liquid adsorption chromatography at critical conditions (LACCC)
conditions.detector: refractive index detector (model 7511, ERC, Alteglofsheim, Germany)
conditions.evidence_text: For analyzing polyester samples, a 7-um Si-120 silica column (Tessek, Praha, CS) was used. The mobile phase for critical conditions consisted of acetone/hexane (50.5 vol%:49.5 vol%). All LACCC columns were thermostated at 30°C.
conditions.corresponding_author_name: R. P. Krüger; H. Much; G. Schulz
conditions.physical_address: Institut far Angewandte Chemie, Berlin-Adlershof (ACA) e. V., Abteilung Zentrale Analytik, Forschungsgruppe Polymercharakterisierung, Rudower Chaussee 5, D-12484 Berlin, Germany

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Liquid adsorption chromatography at critical conditions (LACCC)
conditions.evidence_text: For analyzing polyether samples, a Macherey Nagel Nucleosil 5C18 column (250 x 4mm i. d., Diuren, Germany) was used. The mobile phase at critical conditions consisted of a mixture of water/acetonitrile (54 vol%:46 vol%). All LACCC columns were thermostated at 30°C.
conditions.corresponding_author_name: R. P. Krüger; H. Much; G. Schulz
conditions.physical_address: Institut far Angewandte Chemie, Berlin-Adlershof (ACA) e. V., Abteilung Zentrale Analytik, Forschungsgruppe Polymercharakterisierung, Rudower Chaussee 5, D-12484 Berlin, Germany
